title: This Bull Case In Fertilizers Is Serious: Buying CF Industries And Mosaic In 2023
text: I start by explaining the seriousness of the ongoing fertilizer bull case. Fertilizers made it possible to feed 8 billion people. Now that ability is under pressure. While fertilizer futures and stocks have run into resistance due to demand fears, 2023 is shaping up to be a bullish year for demand as supply remains constrained.
